description: Polish mobile iOS experience to feel more native and maximize screen real estate. 15 improvements: spacing tightening, visual clutter removal, compact form layout, native-feeling transitions, improved lightbox, collapsible store groups, and full Store Manager rewrite.

userStories.title: CSS Quick Wins — Tighten Spacing & Sizing
userStories.description: Batch of CSS-only changes that reduce wasted space across the shopping list view: shrink thumbnails from 60px to 40px, tighten item row padding, fix bottom scroll padding to match actual tab bar height, reduce suggestion chips spacing, compact empty-state padding.
acceptanceCriteria: Thumbnails in ShoppingItem.module.css reduced from 60×60px to 40×40px with proportional border-radius
Item row gap reduced from 0.75rem to 0.5rem and padding from 0.75rem 1rem to 0.5rem 0.75rem on mobile only
Bottom scroll padding in MobileListDetail and ListSelector changed to calc(56px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px))
Suggestions container margin-top reduced to 0.75rem and padding to 0.75rem on mobile only
Empty-state padding reduced from 3rem 1rem to 1.5rem 1rem on mobile only
All changes gated behind @media (max-width: 700px) — desktop layout unaffected
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Thumbnails 40×40, tighter item padding, scroll padding 56px, compact suggestions, compact empty state. All gated behind max-width:700px.
userStories.testIntensityReason: CSS-only spacing adjustments, no logic changes

userStories.title: Remove Store Badge Dashed Border in Edit Panel
userStories.description: The store pill in the item edit panel has a dashed border that looks out of place. Change it to match the category badge style (no border).
acceptanceCriteria: In ShoppingItem.module.css, .storeBadge border changed from '1px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)' to 'none'
Store badge visually matches .category badge style
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Removed dashed border from .storeBadge, now matches .category badge style.

userStories.title: Remove Chevron from List Items
userStories.description: The › chevron on each list row adds visual noise without aiding navigation. Remove it.
acceptanceCriteria: Chevron span removed from renderListItem() in ListSelector.jsx
.chevron styles removed or commented out in ListSelector.module.css
List items no longer show a trailing chevron
Tap-to-open list still works
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Removed chevron span from renderListItem() and both .chevron CSS blocks.
userStories.testIntensityReason: Remove one JSX element and its CSS

userStories.title: Hide Price Placeholder When No Price Set
userStories.description: When an item has no price, the UI shows '$–' which wastes space. Hide the price element entirely when no price is set.
acceptanceCriteria: In ShoppingItem.jsx, price element not rendered when item.price is null, undefined, empty string, or 0
Items with a valid price still display it normally (e.g. $4.99)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Price element now conditionally rendered only when lineTotal is not null.
userStories.testIntensityReason: Conditional render tweak, single line change

userStories.title: AddItemForm — Single-Line Compact Layout
userStories.description: The add-item form currently wraps to two lines on mobile. All three controls (input, store select, add button) should fit on one line to save vertical space.
acceptanceCriteria: On mobile (max-width: 700px), form renders as single row: text input, store select, add button
Text input takes remaining space (flex: 1)
Store select narrowed: min-width: 0, max-width: 90px, padding: 0.4rem 0.25rem
Add button compact: padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem
Overall row height matches search bar (min-height: 36px), input padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem
flex-wrap: wrap removed/overridden on mobile
On a 375px viewport, all three controls fit on one line without wrapping
Desktop layout unaffected
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Replaced 480px block with 700px block. flex-wrap:nowrap, compact padding, max-width:90px on store select.
userStories.testIntensityReason: Layout restructure on mobile, needs viewport testing

userStories.title: Replace '+ New' Button with iOS-Style Plus Button
userStories.description: Replace the '+ New' text button with a circular + icon button for a more native iOS feel.
acceptanceCriteria: The '+ New' text is replaced with a circular button containing a + character or SVG plus icon
Button style: ~28px circle, primary background, white icon, centered flex
Positioned in header area near search bar or list title
During creation (cancel state), shows × icon in same circular style with muted background
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Replaced '+ New' with circular 28px button (32px on mobile). × icon in cancel state with muted background.

userStories.title: Improve Navigation Push Transition
userStories.description: The current slide-left transition moves the list screen only 30% left, feeling like an overlay. Update to fully push the list off-screen for native iOS push navigation feel.
acceptanceCriteria: slideOutLeft keyframes updated to translateX(-100%) instead of translateX(-30%)
slideInFromLeft keyframes updated to start from translateX(-100%) instead of translateX(-30%)
Duration stays at 300ms with ease-out timing
Reduced-motion media query still disables animations
Opening a list slides the list view fully off-screen left while detail slides in from right
Back navigation reverses the transition smoothly
Lint passes

userStories.title: Image Lightbox — Larger Preview & Relocated Remove Button
userStories.description: The current image preview in the ImagePicker modal is only 120×120px. Make it much larger and relocate the Remove image button so it doesn't compete with the image.
acceptanceCriteria: Preview image fills available modal width: width: 100%, max-width: 400px, height: auto, aspect-ratio: 1, object-fit: contain
On narrow viewports (max-width: 480px), preview is full-width minus padding
Remove image button positioned below or at bottom-right of the image, not overlapping
Remove button has min 44×44px touch target
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes

userStories.title: Collapsible Store Groups in Shopping List
userStories.description: Store sections in the shopping list are always expanded. Add tap-to-collapse/expand on store headers to reduce scrolling.
acceptanceCriteria: collapsedStores state added to ShoppingList.jsx tracking which store IDs are collapsed
Tapping a .storeTitle toggles that store's collapsed state
When collapsed, .storeBody items are hidden and a right-pointing chevron is shown
When expanded, chevron points down or rotates to indicate open state
Default state: all stores expanded
Chevron has CSS transition for rotation (transform: rotate with ~0.2s transition)
Item count badge always visible in store header regardless of collapsed state
Checked items section is not collapsible
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
npm run build succeeds
userStories.testIntensityReason: New interactive state with toggle logic

userStories.title: Store Manager — Full ListSelector-Like Treatment
userStories.description: Rewrite the Stores tab to match the Lists tab polish level: dedicated list view with search bar, + button in header, store list with three-dot menus, action sheets on mobile, drag-to-reorder.
acceptanceCriteria: Stores tab renders a list view matching ListSelector layout: header with title + circular + button, search bar, scrollable store list
Each store row shows: color dot, store name, item count, and three-dot menu button
Search bar filters stores by name
+ button opens inline creation row at top of list (same pattern as ListSelector)
Three-dot menu on store row opens action sheet on mobile with: Edit Name, Change Color, Delete
Edit Name converts row to inline edit input
Change Color shows color picker (row of color swatches)
Delete shows confirmation dialog then calls onDelete
Stores remain reorderable via drag handle on left side
On mobile in App.jsx, Stores tab renders new StoreManager directly (remove mobileHeader + mobileScrollContent wrapper if no longer needed)
alwaysOpen prop removed if no longer needed
Desktop StoreManager also benefits from the new component (or at minimum does not regress)
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
npm run build succeeds
npx cap sync ios succeeds
userStories.notes: Largest story — major component rewrite. Should be implemented last after US-006 establishes the circular + button pattern.
userStories.testIntensityReason: Major component rewrite with multiple interaction patterns
